caption:
The morning light spills through the library glass, catching the dust motes dancing around me. I adjust the collar of my blouse—a deep navy silk that hugs my chest, hidden by a structured blazer that screams authority but whispers desire. Spring air is crisp, but the heat rises from my own confidence. Students glance, I smile, and I know exactly what they see beneath the fabric. It's not just a lecture today; it's a performance. 🍃👠
#universityteacher #springvibes #confident #teacherlife
